description.en: The snowshoe hare is a master of disguise whose coat changes from brown in summer to pure white in winter.
description.zh: 雪鞋兔是伪装大师，它的皮毛会在夏天呈棕色，到了冬天则变成纯白色。

anatomy.en: Named for their large hind feet, which are lined with stiff hairs, they can run on top of deep snow without sinking. Their seasonal color-changing coat is a perfect camouflage against hungry predators.
anatomy.zh: 它们因巨大的后脚而得名，脚底长满了硬毛，让它们能在深雪上奔跑而不下陷。它们随季节变色的皮毛是抵御饥饿捕食者的完美伪装。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are incredibly fast, capable of reaching speeds up to 43 km/h to escape their main enemy, the Canadian lynx. They eat grasses and ferns in summer, and chew on twigs and tree bark during the harsh winters.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们速度极快，能以高达43公里/小时的速度奔跑，以躲避它们的主要天敌——加拿大猞猁。它们在夏天吃草和蕨类植物，在严冬则啃食树枝和树皮。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are widely distributed across the northern forests of North America. Like the lynx that hunts them, their population numbers go up and down in a dramatic 10-year cycle.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们广泛分布在北美洲的北方森林中。就像捕猎它们的猞猁一样，它们的种群数量呈现出戏剧性的「十年一循环」的波动。

habitat.text_zh: 北方针叶林及山地森林
